source_references: Ustawa z dnia 12 maja 2011 r. o refundacji leków, środków spożywczych specjalnego przeznaczenia żywieniowego oraz wyrobów medycznych (Reimbursement Act of 12 May 2011)
Obwieszczenie Ministra Zdrowia z dnia 17 marca 2026 r.
interpretation_text: Cena zbytu netto is the manufacturer net selling price in PLN, excluding VAT, as set under the Reimbursement Act 2011. It is the regulated manufacturer-side reference from which Urzędowa cena zbytu (= netto + VAT) and Cena hurtowa (= netto + wholesale margin + VAT) are derived. Maps to comparison_category=manufacturer_price.
caveats: Polish pharmaceutical VAT is 8% (current rate). Comparing Cena zbytu netto with another country's VAT-inclusive figure requires an explicit VAT-handling derivation rule.

Some entries in B/C lists (programy lekowe, chemioterapia) use a different reimbursement mechanism (refundacja apteczna vs. szpitalna); the published price still appears in the same column but the negotiation context differs.

notes: Polish pharmaceutical VAT is 8% (current rate). Comparing Cena zbytu netto with another country's VAT-inclusive figure requires an explicit VAT-handling derivation rule.

Some entries in B/C lists (programy lekowe, chemioterapia) use a different reimbursement mechanism (refundacja apteczna vs. szpitalna); the published price still appears in the same column but the negotiation context differs.

source_references: Ustawa z dnia 12 maja 2011 r. o refundacji leków
Obwieszczenie Ministra Zdrowia z dnia 17 marca 2026 r.
interpretation_text: Cena hurtowa brutto is the wholesale gross price in PLN, including the regulated wholesale margin (5% on Cena zbytu netto, capped) AND VAT (8% for medicines). It is the price at which wholesalers supply pharmacies. Maps to comparison_category=pharmacy_purchase_price.
caveats: Includes VAT — when comparing with Ireland's PCRS Reimbursement Price (which is ex-VAT), strip VAT first via an explicit derivation rule: Cena_hurtowa_netto = Cena_hurtowa_brutto / 1.08.
The 5% wholesale margin is capped (currently at PLN 8.91 for items above ~PLN 178), creating a non-linear relationship between Cena zbytu netto and Cena hurtowa for high-priced items.
For B/C/D/E/F2/G1/G2 lists (hospital reimbursement, special schemes) Cena hurtowa is published but the actual flow may not pass through community pharmacies; treat caveat-laden when comparing.

notes: Includes VAT — when comparing with Ireland's PCRS Reimbursement Price (which is ex-VAT), strip VAT first via an explicit derivation rule: Cena_hurtowa_netto = Cena_hurtowa_brutto / 1.08.
The 5% wholesale margin is capped (currently at PLN 8.91 for items above ~PLN 178), creating a non-linear relationship between Cena zbytu netto and Cena hurtowa for high-priced items.
For B/C/D/E/F2/G1/G2 lists (hospital reimbursement, special schemes) Cena hurtowa is published but the actual flow may not pass through community pharmacies; treat caveat-laden when comparing.

source_references: Ustawa z dnia 12 maja 2011 r. o refundacji leków
interpretation_text: Cena detaliczna is the retail price patients pay at the pharmacy, including the regulated pharmacy margin and VAT. Maps to comparison_category=public_retail_price.
caveats: Patient out-of-pocket varies by reimbursement category (R, B, IB, S, G); Cena detaliczna is the gross retail before reimbursement netting.

notes: Patient out-of-pocket varies by reimbursement category (R, B, IB, S, G); Cena detaliczna is the gross retail before reimbursement netting.

source_references: Ustawa z dnia 12 maja 2011 r. o refundacji leków
interpretation_text: Urzędowa cena zbytu is the official sale price = Cena zbytu netto × (1 + VAT). Manufacturer-side, but VAT-inclusive. Maps to manufacturer_price with includes_vat=true.
includes_margin: VAT only (no wholesale or pharmacy margin)
caveats: Compared with another country's manufacturer_price, VAT must be normalised via derivation rule.

notes: Compared with another country's manufacturer_price, VAT must be normalised via derivation rule.
